novelty: measured-Tc-zero (group-17 halide H3X — no measured high-pressure Tc); §9.15 FAIL above predicted 25-60K (+75%)
purpose: Group-17 (halide) Cl-analog. Tests whether H3X stoichiometry generalizes beyond chalcogenides. §9.15 prediction band 25-60K based on lower H content + halide ionicity.
system: H3Cl cubic Im-3m BCC primitive (1 Cl + 3 H = 4 atoms), celldm=5.65934 bohr (a≈2.995 Å), PBE PAW

method.scf: ecutwfc=60 Ry, ecutrho=600 Ry, 24x24x24 k-grid, MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry
method.phonon: ph.x DFPT ldisp 6x6x6 q (16 irreducible, weights [4,12,12,12,12,12,8,8,12,12,12,8,12,8,12,4]=160), electron_phonon='simple', el_ph_sigma 0.005-0.050 Ry (10 broadenings)
method.moments: BZ-weighted lambda + lambda-weighted log-average omega_log; Allen-Dynes Tc with mu*=0.10 and 0.13

ALIGNN_per_cand.pathology_note: ALIGNN AD-from-a2F gives Tc=3.9K vs DFT 105-134K — 27-34× underprediction. ω_log_ML=81.5K vs DFT 1250K (15× off). Halide X out-of-distribution for ALIGNN training set.

section_9_15_verdict.broadening_monotonicity: λ_BZ monotone increasing with broadening (1.14 → 1.41 across 0.015→0.030) — UNDER-CONVERGED. True converged Tc likely lower-bounded by 0.015 value 105K, upper bound uncertain. Higher q-grid (8×8×8) recommended.
section_9_15_verdict.caveat: Under-convergence caveat may partially reconcile §9.15 prediction — if true converged λ is closer to 0.8-1.0, Tc collapses to ~50-80K (within or near band).

honest_observations: First halide (group-17) candidate cleared DFT 6×6×6q pipeline. Monotone-increasing λ with broadening is the under-converged BZ-sampling signature.
DFT Tc 105-134K fails §8.9 RTSC (Tc≥270K + ambient) but is a publishable novel halide-superconductor DFT prediction.
ALIGNN AD-from-a2F gives positive lambda (0.81) but Tc collapses due to ω_log underestimate (81K vs DFT 1250K).
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. R4 Pattern 1 + Pattern 2 preserved. §9.15 FAIL framed as scientific finding (under-convergence caveat), not impossibility.
citations: RTSC.md §9.15 (H3X group sweep — Cl FAIL above band)
